semantic_rule_excerpt: high_inflation_strategy: if inflation is high (>3%), then maintain consumption around 3%; confidence=0.6666666666666666
raw_rationale_excerpt: With inflation rising, it's prudent to work minimally and adjust consumption to 3% to preserve wealth.
My wealth decreased slightly last month, so I will maintain full employment and keep consumption at 6% to stabilize my savings against rising prices.
